name: @pullup/api
description: PullUp API — Hono on Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, Access-gated

scripts.db:apply:local: wrangler d1 execute pullup --local --file=src/db/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute pullup --local --file=src/db/migrations/0002_seed.sql
scripts.db:apply:remote: wrangler d1 execute pullup --remote --file=src/db/migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute pullup --remote --file=src/db/migrations/0002_seed.sql
scripts.db:studio: wrangler d1 execute pullup --local --command 'SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type="table";'
